_comment: Hard cases for the headline-dedupe judge, drawn from the real announced-history ledger's contested band ([0.35,0.50) Jaccard). Each case: an incoming headline + the single most-similar prior alert + the ground-truth label. 'duplicate' = same underlying event re-reported (judge SHOULD suppress, HIGH confidence). 'distinct' = genuinely different news that merely shares vocabulary (judge MUST keep). Used by the local prompt smoke-test and as documentation of the failure modes the prompt must handle. The cardinal sin is mislabeling a 'distinct' as 'duplicate' (eating real news).

cases.label: distinct
cases.incoming: MICRON MARKET CAP CROSSES $900B — JOINS SK HYNIX IN MEMORY SUPER-CYCLE MEGA-RALLY
cases.candidate: SK HYNIX MARKET CAP CROSSES $900 BILLION ON HBM SUPER-CYCLE
cases.note: Same metric ($900B market cap) and beat (memory super-cycle), DIFFERENT company. The hardest false-positive: high lexical overlap, genuinely distinct subject.

cases.label: distinct
cases.incoming: META RELEASES LLAMA 5 WITH 2M TOKEN CONTEXT AND NATIVE VOICE
cases.note: Follow-up carries genuinely new facts (2M context, native voice). The flash was already sent; this adds information and has standalone value.

cases.label: distinct
cases.incoming: DEEPSEEK CUTS API PRICING ACROSS THE BOARD
cases.candidate: GOOGLE CUTS GEMINI API PRICING ACROSS THE BOARD
cases.note: Same templated action (cuts API pricing), different company. Two separate events.

cases.label: distinct
cases.incoming: xAI HANDLE CONFIRMS COLOSSUS 1 LEASE TO ANTHROPIC + MULTI-GIGAWATT ORBITAL COMPUTE
cases.candidate: ANTHROPIC + SPACEX EXPLORING MULTI-GIGAWATT ORBITAL AI COMPUTE PARTNERSHIP
cases.note: Prior was 'exploring'; incoming is an official confirmation with a concrete lease — a real escalation, not a re-report.

cases.label: duplicate
cases.incoming: CHINA NDRC ORDERS META TO UNWIND $2B MANUS ACQUISITION — FIRST FORCED UNWIND
cases.candidate: CHINA ORDERS META TO UNWIND $2B MANUS AI DEAL — ~100 STAFF ALREADY INSIDE
cases.note: Same regulatory action (China orders Meta to unwind the $2B Manus deal), reported by two accounts.

cases.label: duplicate
cases.incoming: DEEPSEEK IN TALKS FOR $45B FIRST FUNDRAISE — CHINA'S LARGEST STATE-BACKED ROUND
cases.candidate: DEEPSEEK IN TALKS TO RAISE AT ~$45B IN FIRST MAJOR ROUND — CHINA STATE-BACKED
cases.note: Same fundraise (~$45B, first round, state-backed), paraphrased.

cases.label: duplicate
cases.incoming: SIERRA RAISES $950M LED BY TIGER GLOBAL AND GV AT $15B+ VALUATION
cases.candidate: SIERRA RAISES $950M SERIES E AT $15B+ VALUATION, TIGER GLOBAL + GV LED
cases.note: Same raise ($950M, $15B+, Tiger Global + GV), same event.

cases.label: duplicate
cases.incoming: OPENAI-BROADCOM $18B CHIP DEAL HITS FINANCING SNAG — MEMO: 'CAN'T REQUIRE'
cases.candidate: OPENAI-BROADCOM 10GW CHIP DEAL HITS FINANCING SNAG — $18 BILLION HINGES ON
cases.note: Same story (OpenAI-Broadcom $18B chip deal hits a financing snag).
